event: Portrait of Jakob Florisz Van Montfort
description: A full-length portrait of a man standing in a stone arched niche. He wears a colorful outfit with a green and brown tunic, red patterned hose, and a feathered hat with large white plumes. He holds a heraldic shield with a black and white checkered pattern. Above the arch, two coats of arms with decorative scrollwork are visible. The figure is rendered in a detailed, formal style against a gray stone background.

_meta.title: Portrait of Jakob Florisz Van Montfort
